summary: Matrix‑sourced recording captures the late‑80s punch of the show, highlighted by an epic Terrapin Station climax and a heartfelt Stella Blue.
review: Both sets are concise yet deliver that unmistakable late‑80s energy, with the end of Terrapin Station soaring on a deep low “E” from Brent and Phil and an emotional rendition of Stella Blue that moved listeners to tears. The matrix mix is clear enough to convey the atmosphere without any reported flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave high marks (4‑5 stars) and praised the musical performance; no recording issues were noted, suggesting a good‑to‑excellent matrix source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No complaints about sound; reviewers imply the mix captures the vibe well.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Both sets are short but packed with the punchy, late‑80s feel that fans appreciate.

band_member_comments.Phil: Delivered a super low “E” at the end of Terrapin Station that lifted the crowd.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent’s keyboard work helped levitate the audience with that deep low note.
